{{CargoClone
|name=Princess Sun
|rank=orange
|cabin=2
|id=163
|gene1={race} RUSH +50
|gene2={race} TECH +50
|gene3=Per 10% HP lost, {race} RUSH +60
|gene4=Per 60 Angel Minions in battle,
Troop Wind DMG +6
|gene5=Resolver: W-tads extracted +9
|gene6=Per 60 Angel Minions in battle,
Troop Wind DMG +10
|gene7=Resolver: W-tads extracted +15
|}}
